---
title: "Gambler's Ledger"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400..900;1,400..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  /* Hide Quarto-generated page title (masthead replaces it) */
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }

  /* ---- Layout ---- */
  .betledger-app {
    max-width: 820px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 1rem 1rem 2rem;
    font-family: inherit;
  }

  /* ---- Masthead ---- */
  .bl-masthead {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 0.6rem 0 0.4rem;
  }

  .bl-masthead-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 3.5rem);
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: #2d3436;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .bl-masthead-date {
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #868e96;
    margin-top: 0.15rem;
  }

  .bl-masthead-strapline {
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    line-height: 1.55;
    color: #495057;
    text-align: justify;
    margin: 0.6rem 0 0;
  }

  .bl-masthead-strapline a {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration: underline;
    text-decoration-color: #adb5bd;
    text-underline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .bl-masthead-strapline a:hover {
    text-decoration-color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bl-masthead-title {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bl-masthead-date {
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bl-masthead-strapline {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bl-masthead-strapline a {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration-color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bl-masthead-strapline a:hover {
    text-decoration-color: #adb5bd;
  }

  /* ---- Typography ---- */
  .bl-heading {
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  }

  .bl-smallcaps {
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  /* ---- Dividers ---- */
  .bl-rule {
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid #2d3436;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .bl-rule-thin {
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .bl-rule-double {
    border: none;
    border-top: 3px double #2d3436;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ---- Bet table ---- */
  .bets-table-wrap {
    overflow-x: auto;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .bets-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
  }

  .bets-table thead th {
    padding: 0.4rem 0.5rem;
    text-align: left;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #2d3436;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #2d3436;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .bets-table tbody td {
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    vertical-align: top;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  .bets-table tbody tr:last-child td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #2d3436;
  }

  .bets-table .col-stake,
  .bets-table .col-resolved,
  .bets-table .col-draw,
  .bets-table .col-void,
  .bets-table .col-winner,
  .bets-table .col-actions {
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .bets-table .col-bet {
    min-width: 180px;
  }

  .bets-table .col-stake {
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .bet-desc-main {
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    color: #2d3436;
    margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
  }

  .bet-positions-sub {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: #6c757d;
    line-height: 1.35;
  }

  .bet-positions-sub .pos-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    color: #495057;
  }

  .bet-date-sub {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: #adb5bd;
    margin-top: 0.1rem;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  /* Status indicators */
  .status-yes {
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .status-no, .winner-dash {
    color: #ced4da;
  }

  .status-pending {
    font-style: italic;
    color: #868e96;
  }

  /* Winner cell */
  .winner-name {
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  /* Voided row */
  .bets-table tbody tr.row-void .bet-desc-main {
    text-decoration: line-through;
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .bets-table tbody tr.row-void .bet-positions-sub {
    color: #ced4da;
  }

  /* Action link style (used for resolve, edit, delete in-row) */
  .tbl-action {
    border: none;
    background: none;
    padding: 0;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #ced4da;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.15s;
  }

  .tbl-action:hover {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .tbl-action-delete:hover {
    color: #dc3545;
  }

  /* ---- Overleaf dropdown ---- */
  .bet-overleaf {
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
  }

  .bet-overleaf summary {
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #ced4da;
    transition: color 0.15s;
    list-style: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.25rem;
  }

  .bet-overleaf summary::-webkit-details-marker {
    display: none;
  }

  .bet-overleaf summary::before {
    content: '▸';
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    transition: transform 0.15s;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .bet-overleaf[open] summary::before {
    transform: rotate(90deg);
  }

  .bet-overleaf summary:hover {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .bet-overleaf-content {
    padding: 0.3rem 0 0.1rem 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: #6c757d;
    line-height: 1.6;
    border-left: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    margin-left: 0.15rem;
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
  }

  .overleaf-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .overleaf-label {
    font-variant: small-caps;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    color: #495057;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
  }

  .overleaf-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    margin-top: 0.15rem;
  }

  /* ---- Overdue tag ---- */
  .overdue-tag {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #c0392b;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* ---- New bet form ---- */
  .new-bet-section {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    padding-top: 0.25rem;
  }

  .new-bet-section summary {
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #2d3436;
    padding: 0.4rem 0;
    transition: color 0.15s;
  }

  .new-bet-section summary:hover {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .new-bet-form {
    padding: 1rem 0;
    border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }

  .form-group {
    margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
  }

  .form-group label {
    display: block;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: #495057;
    margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
  }

  .form-input {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.45rem 0.5rem;
    border: 1px solid #adb5bd;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-family: inherit;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    background: transparent;
    transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
  }

  .form-input:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #2d3436;
  }

  .form-input::placeholder {
    color: #ced4da;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .stake-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.35rem;
  }

  .stake-row .currency {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #2d3436;
  }

  .stake-row .form-input {
    width: 90px;
  }

  .place-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.45rem 1.2rem;
    border: 2px solid #2d3436;
    background: none;
    color: #2d3436;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
    margin-top: 0.35rem;
  }

  .place-btn:hover {
    background: #2d3436;
    color: #fff;
  }

  .place-btn:active {
    opacity: 0.8;
  }

  .place-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.35;
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }

  /* ---- Compact scoreboard ---- */
  .summary-strip {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.5rem 0;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
  }

  .summary-item {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .summary-item .s-name {
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #2d3436;
  }

  .summary-item .s-detail {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  /* ---- Settle strip ---- */
  .settle-strip {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.5rem 0;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .settle-strip .owes {
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #2d3436;
  }

  .settle-btn {
    padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
    border: 1px solid #2d3436;
    background: none;
    color: #2d3436;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-variant: small-caps;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
  }

  .settle-btn:hover {
    background: #2d3436;
    color: #fff;
  }

  .settle-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.35;
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }

  /* ---- Settlement history ---- */
  .settlement-history {
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }

  .settlement-history summary {
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #868e96;
    transition: color 0.15s;
  }

  .settlement-history summary:hover {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .settlement-history table {
    width: 100%;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    border-collapse: collapse;
  }

  .settlement-history th, .settlement-history td {
    padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .settlement-history th {
    font-variant: small-caps;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: #495057;
  }

  /* ---- Resolve modal ---- */
  .resolve-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
    z-index: 1000;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .resolve-overlay.active {
    display: flex;
  }

  .resolve-modal {
    background: #fff;
    border: 2px solid #2d3436;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    max-width: 320px;
    width: 90%;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .resolve-modal h4 {
    margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #2d3436;
  }

  .resolve-modal .resolve-options {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.4rem;
  }

  .resolve-modal .resolve-options button {
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border: 1px solid #2d3436;
    background: none;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
    color: #2d3436;
  }

  .resolve-modal .resolve-options button:hover {
    background: #2d3436;
    color: #fff;
  }

  .resolve-modal .opt-void {
    border-color: #adb5bd;
    color: #868e96;
  }

  .resolve-modal .opt-void:hover {
    background: #868e96;
    color: #fff;
  }

  .resolve-modal .opt-cancel {
    border: none;
    color: #adb5bd;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-top: 0.15rem;
  }

  .resolve-modal .opt-cancel:hover {
    color: #495057;
    background: none;
  }

  /* ---- Status messages ---- */
  .status-bar {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: #dc3545;
    min-height: 1.5em;
  }

  .loading {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem;
    color: #868e96;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .empty-state {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
    color: #adb5bd;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  /* ---- Dark mode ---- */
  .quarto-dark .bl-rule {
    border-top-color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bl-rule-thin {
    border-top-color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bl-rule-double {
    border-top-color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bets-table thead th {
    color: #dee2e6;
    border-bottom-color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bets-table tbody td {
    border-bottom-color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bets-table tbody tr:last-child td {
    border-bottom-color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bet-desc-main {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bet-positions-sub {
    color: #868e96;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bet-positions-sub .pos-name {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bet-date-sub {
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .status-no, .quarto-dark .winner-dash {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .status-pending {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .winner-name {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bets-table tbody tr.row-void .bet-desc-main {
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bets-table tbody tr.row-void .bet-positions-sub {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .tbl-action {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .tbl-action:hover {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .tbl-action-delete:hover {
    color: #e5484d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bet-overleaf summary {
    color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bet-overleaf summary:hover {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .bet-overleaf-content {
    color: #868e96;
    border-left-color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .overleaf-label {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .overdue-tag {
    color: #e5484d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .new-bet-section summary {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .new-bet-section summary:hover {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .new-bet-form {
    border-top-color: #495057;
  }

  .quarto-dark .form-group label {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .form-input {
    border-color: #6c757d;
    color: #dee2e6;
    background: transparent;
  }

  .quarto-dark .form-input:focus {
    border-color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .form-input::placeholder {
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .stake-row .currency {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .place-btn {
    border-color: #dee2e6;
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .place-btn:hover {
    background: #dee2e6;
    color: #1e1f22;
  }

  .quarto-dark .summary-item .s-name {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .summary-item .s-detail {
    color: #868e96;
  }

  .quarto-dark .settle-strip .owes {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .settle-btn {
    border-color: #dee2e6;
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .settle-btn:hover {
    background: #dee2e6;
    color: #1e1f22;
  }

  .quarto-dark .settlement-history summary {
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .settlement-history summary:hover {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .settlement-history th {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .settlement-history th,
  .quarto-dark .settlement-history td {
    border-bottom-color: #495057;
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal {
    background: #1e1f22;
    border-color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal h4 {
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal .resolve-options button {
    border-color: #dee2e6;
    color: #dee2e6;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal .resolve-options button:hover {
    background: #dee2e6;
    color: #1e1f22;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal .opt-void {
    border-color: #6c757d;
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal .opt-void:hover {
    background: #6c757d;
    color: #1e1f22;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal .opt-cancel {
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .resolve-modal .opt-cancel:hover {
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .quarto-dark .status-bar {
    color: #e5484d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .loading {
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .quarto-dark .empty-state {
    color: #6c757d;
  }
</style>

<div class="betledger-app">
  <div class="status-bar" id="statusBar"></div>

  <div class="loading" id="loadingMsg">Loading the ledger...</div>

  <div id="appContent" style="display:none;">

    <!-- Masthead -->
    <div class="bl-masthead">
      <div class="bl-masthead-title">The Gambler's Ledger</div>
      <div class="bl-masthead-date" id="mastheadDate"></div>
      <p class="bl-masthead-strapline"><strong>SYDNEY, New South Wales</strong> — A local couple, locked in a long-running series of trivial domestic wagers, have today made their betting record public. The pair, who have asked to be identified only as Ben and Verity, confirmed that their wagers range from their toddler's mealtime behaviour to whether local starlets Timothée and Kylie are soon to be betrothed. Stakes rarely exceed a few dollars. Only the couple may place or resolve bets, but the public is invited to inspect the record below. This ledger was produced with the assistance of <a href="https://benjackman.github.io/tinkering/"> Claude, a vast and foreign machine intelligence</a>.</p>
    </div>

    <hr class="bl-rule-double">

    <!-- Bet table -->
    <div class="bets-table-wrap">
      <table class="bets-table" id="betsTable">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th class="col-bet">bet</th>
            <th class="col-stake">stake</th>
            <th class="col-resolved">resolved</th>
            <th class="col-draw">draw</th>
            <th class="col-void">void</th>
            <th class="col-winner">winner</th>
            <th class="col-actions"></th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="betsTableBody">
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <!-- New bet form -->
    <details class="new-bet-section" id="newBetDetails">
      <summary>Record another wager</summary>
      <div class="new-bet-form">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label for="betDesc">the bet</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="betDesc" placeholder="e.g. Baby will eat the broccoli" maxlength="300">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label for="betBen">ben says</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="betBen" placeholder="e.g. She'll do it" maxlength="200">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label for="betVerity">verity says</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="betVerity" placeholder="e.g. No chance" maxlength="200">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>stake</label>
          <div class="stake-row">
            <span class="currency">$</span>
            <input type="number" class="form-input" id="betStake" value="1" min="0.01" step="0.01" max="1000">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label for="betHorizon">horizon <span style="font-variant:normal;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;letter-spacing:0;">(optional)</span></label>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" id="betHorizon" style="width:170px;">
        </div>
        <button class="place-btn" id="placeBtn" onclick="placeBet()">place bet</button>
      </div>
    </details>

    <hr class="bl-rule-thin" style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">

    <!-- Compact scoreboard -->
    <div class="summary-strip">
      <div class="summary-item">
        <div class="s-name">Ben</div>
        <div class="s-detail" id="winsBen">0 wins · $0.00</div>
      </div>
      <div class="summary-item">
        <div class="s-name">Verity</div>
        <div class="s-detail" id="winsVerity">0 wins · $0.00</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Settle strip -->
    <div class="settle-strip">
      <span class="owes" id="owesText">All square!</span>
      <button class="settle-btn" id="settleBtn" onclick="settleUp()">settle up</button>
    </div>

    <hr class="bl-rule-thin">

    <!-- Settlement history -->
    <details class="settlement-history">
      <summary>Settlement history</summary>
      <table id="settlementTable">
        <thead>
          <tr><th>date</th><th>ben</th><th>verity</th><th>result</th></tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="settlementBody">
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </details>

    <!-- Auth bar -->
    <div id="authBar" style="display:none;text-align:right;margin-top:0.75rem;font-size:0.72rem;font-style:italic;">
      <button class="tbl-action" onclick="signOut()">sign out</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Resolve modal -->
  <div class="resolve-overlay" id="resolveOverlay">
    <div class="resolve-modal">
      <h4 id="resolveTitle">Who won?</h4>
      <div class="resolve-options">
        <button class="opt-ben" onclick="confirmResolve('ben')">Ben wins</button>
        <button class="opt-verity" onclick="confirmResolve('verity')">Verity wins</button>
        <button class="opt-draw" onclick="confirmResolve('draw')">Draw</button>
        <button class="opt-void" onclick="confirmResolve('void')">Void</button>
        <button class="opt-cancel" onclick="closeResolve()">cancel</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Edit modal -->
  <div class="resolve-overlay" id="editOverlay">
    <div class="resolve-modal" style="text-align:left;">
      <h4 style="text-align:center;">Edit wager</h4>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="editDesc">the bet</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="editDesc" maxlength="300">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="editBen">ben says</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="editBen" maxlength="200">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="editVerity">verity says</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="editVerity" maxlength="200">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>stake</label>
        <div class="stake-row">
          <span class="currency">$</span>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" id="editStake" min="0.01" step="0.01" max="1000">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="editHorizon">horizon <span style="font-variant:normal;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;letter-spacing:0;">(optional)</span></label>
        <input type="date" class="form-input" id="editHorizon" style="width:170px;">
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:0.4rem;justify-content:center;margin-top:0.75rem;">
        <button class="place-btn" onclick="saveEdit()">save</button>
        <button class="resolve-modal opt-cancel" onclick="closeEdit()" style="padding:0.45rem 1rem;">cancel</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Login modal -->
  <div class="resolve-overlay" id="loginOverlay" style="z-index:1001;">
    <div class="resolve-modal" style="text-align:left;">
      <h4 style="text-align:center;">Sign in</h4>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="loginEmail">email</label>
        <input type="email" class="form-input" id="loginEmail" autocomplete="email">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label for="loginPassword">password</label>
        <input type="password" class="form-input" id="loginPassword" autocomplete="current-password">
      </div>
      <div id="loginError" style="color:#dc3545;font-size:0.8rem;text-align:center;min-height:1.2em;margin-bottom:0.25rem;"></div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:0.4rem;justify-content:center;margin-top:0.5rem;">
        <button class="place-btn" id="loginSubmitBtn" onclick="submitLogin()">sign in</button>
        <button class="resolve-modal opt-cancel" onclick="cancelLogin()" style="padding:0.45rem 1rem;">cancel</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Supabase JS client -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2/dist/umd/supabase.min.js"></script>

<script>
  // ============================================================
  // CONFIG
  // ============================================================
  const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://pkiocdaqdnpkwvvqfwwd.supabase.co';
  const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'sb_publishable_lr7mFUX6xdrq4AS8ct3o6w_qj9J2kh3';
  // ============================================================

  const sb = window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);

  // ---- Auth ----
  let currentUser = null;
  let loginResolve = null;

  async function initAuth() {
    const { data: { session } } = await sb.auth.getSession();
    currentUser = session?.user ?? null;
    sb.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {
      currentUser = session?.user ?? null;
      updateAuthUI();
    });
  }

  function updateAuthUI() {
    const authBar = document.getElementById('authBar');
    if (authBar) authBar.style.display = currentUser ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  async function requireAuth() {
    if (currentUser) return true;
    return new Promise(resolve => {
      loginResolve = resolve;
      document.getElementById('loginOverlay').classList.add('active');
      setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('loginEmail').focus(), 50);
    });
  }

  async function submitLogin() {
    const email = document.getElementById('loginEmail').value.trim();
    const password = document.getElementById('loginPassword').value;
    const errEl = document.getElementById('loginError');
    const btn = document.getElementById('loginSubmitBtn');

    if (!email || !password) {
      errEl.textContent = 'Enter your email and password.';
      return;
    }

    btn.disabled = true;
    errEl.textContent = '';

    const { data, error } = await sb.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password });
    btn.disabled = false;

    if (error) {
      errEl.textContent = 'Incorrect email or password.';
      return;
    }

    currentUser = data.user;
    document.getElementById('loginOverlay').classList.remove('active');
    document.getElementById('loginEmail').value = '';
    document.getElementById('loginPassword').value = '';

    if (loginResolve) {
      loginResolve(true);
      loginResolve = null;
    }
  }

  function cancelLogin() {
    document.getElementById('loginOverlay').classList.remove('active');
    if (loginResolve) {
      loginResolve(false);
      loginResolve = null;
    }
  }

  async function signOut() {
    await sb.auth.signOut();
  }

  // ---- State ----
  let lastSettlement = null;
  let currentBets = [];
  let resolvingBetId = null;

  // ---- Init ----
  async function init() {
    try {
      await initAuth();
      await loadLastSettlement();
      await Promise.all([loadBets(), loadSettlements()]);
      renderAll();
      document.getElementById('loadingMsg').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('appContent').style.display = 'block';
    } catch (e) {
      showStatus('Failed to connect — check Supabase config.');
      console.error(e);
    }
  }

  // ---- Data loading ----
  async function loadLastSettlement() {
    const { data, error } = await sb
      .from('bet_settlements')
      .select('created_at')
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(1);
    if (error) throw error;
    lastSettlement = data.length > 0 ? data[0].created_at : null;
  }

  async function loadBets() {
    if (lastSettlement) {
      const { data: active, error: e1 } = await sb
        .from('bets')
        .select('*')
        .eq('resolved', false);
      const { data: resolved, error: e2 } = await sb
        .from('bets')
        .select('*')
        .eq('resolved', true)
        .gt('resolved_at', lastSettlement);
      if (e1) throw e1;
      if (e2) throw e2;
      currentBets = [...(active || []), ...(resolved || [])];
    } else {
      const { data, error } = await sb
        .from('bets')
        .select('*');
      if (error) throw error;
      currentBets = data || [];
    }
  }

  async function loadSettlements() {
    const { data, error } = await sb
      .from('bet_settlements')
      .select('*')
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(20);
    if (error) throw error;

    const tbody = document.getElementById('settlementBody');
    if (!data || data.length === 0) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="4" style="font-style:italic;color:#adb5bd;">No settlements yet</td></tr>';
      return;
    }

    tbody.innerHTML = data.map(row => {
      const date = new Date(row.created_at).toLocaleDateString([], {
        month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric'
      });
      const result = row.net_amount > 0
        ? `${capitalize(row.paid_by)} paid ${capitalize(row.paid_to)} $${row.net_amount.toFixed(2)}`
        : 'Even';
      return `<tr><td>${date}</td><td>$${Number(row.ben_winnings).toFixed(2)}</td><td>$${Number(row.verity_winnings).toFixed(2)}</td><td>${result}</td></tr>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  // ---- Rendering ----
  function renderAll() {
    renderBetsTable();
    renderScoreboard();
    updateOwes();
  }

  function formatHorizon(dateStr) {
    if (!dateStr) return null;
    const d = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00');
    return d.toLocaleDateString([], { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
  }

  function isOverdue(bet) {
    if (!bet.horizon || bet.resolved) return false;
    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const h = new Date(bet.horizon + 'T00:00:00');
    return h <= today;
  }

  function renderBetsTable() {
    const sorted = [...currentBets].sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.resolved !== b.resolved) return a.resolved ? 1 : -1;
      const dateA = new Date(a.resolved ? (a.resolved_at || a.created_at) : a.created_at);
      const dateB = new Date(b.resolved ? (b.resolved_at || b.created_at) : b.created_at);
      return dateB - dateA;
    });

    const tbody = document.getElementById('betsTableBody');
    if (sorted.length === 0) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="empty-state">No bets yet.</td></tr>';
      return;
    }

    tbody.innerHTML = sorted.map(bet => {
      const date = new Date(bet.created_at).toLocaleDateString([], {
        month: 'short', day: 'numeric'
      });

      const isResolved = bet.resolved && bet.winner !== 'void' && bet.winner !== 'draw';
      const isDraw = bet.winner === 'draw';
      const isVoid = bet.winner === 'void';
      const isActive = !bet.resolved;

      let resolvedCell;
      if (isActive) resolvedCell = '<span class="status-yes">No</span>';
      else if (isResolved) resolvedCell = '<span class="status-yes">Yes</span>';
      else resolvedCell = '<span class="status-no">—</span>';

      const drawCell = isDraw
        ? '<span class="status-yes">Yes</span>'
        : '<span class="status-no">—</span>';

      const voidCell = isVoid
        ? '<span class="status-yes">Yes</span>'
        : '<span class="status-no">—</span>';

      let winnerCell;
      if (bet.winner === 'ben') winnerCell = '<span class="winner-name">Ben</span>';
      else if (bet.winner === 'verity') winnerCell = '<span class="winner-name">Verity</span>';
      else winnerCell = '<span class="winner-dash">—</span>';

      // Actions column: only resolve (italic style), for active bets
      let actionsCell = '';
      if (isActive) {
        actionsCell = `<button class="tbl-action" onclick="openResolve('${bet.id}', '${escapeAttr(bet.description)}')">Resolve</button>`;
      }

      // Overdue indicator
      const overdue = isOverdue(bet);
      const overdueTag = overdue ? ' · <span class="overdue-tag">overdue</span>' : '';

      // Horizon display
      const horizonDisplay = bet.horizon
        ? `<span class="overleaf-label">Horizon:</span> ${formatHorizon(bet.horizon)}`
        : '<span style="font-style:italic;">No horizon set</span>';

      // Overleaf actions
      let overleafActions = `<button class="tbl-action" onclick="openEdit('${bet.id}')">edit</button>`;
      if (isActive) {
        overleafActions += `<button class="tbl-action tbl-action-delete" onclick="deleteBet('${bet.id}')">delete</button>`;
      }

      const rowClass = isVoid ? ' class="row-void"' : '';

      return `<tr${rowClass}>
        <td class="col-bet">
          <div class="bet-desc-main">${escapeHtml(bet.description)}</div>
          <div class="bet-positions-sub">
            <span class="pos-name">Ben:</span> ${escapeHtml(bet.ben_position)}
            · <span class="pos-name">Verity:</span> ${escapeHtml(bet.verity_position)}
          </div>
          <div class="bet-date-sub">${date}${overdueTag}</div>
          <details class="bet-overleaf">
            <summary>Overleaf</summary>
            <div class="bet-overleaf-content">
              <div class="overleaf-row">${horizonDisplay}</div>
              <div class="overleaf-actions">${overleafActions}</div>
            </div>
          </details>
        </td>
        <td class="col-stake">$${Number(bet.stake).toFixed(2)}</td>
        <td class="col-resolved">${resolvedCell}</td>
        <td class="col-draw">${drawCell}</td>
        <td class="col-void">${voidCell}</td>
        <td class="col-winner">${winnerCell}</td>
        <td class="col-actions">${actionsCell}</td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  function renderScoreboard() {
    const resolved = currentBets.filter(b => b.resolved && b.winner !== 'void' && b.winner !== 'draw');
    const benWins = resolved.filter(b => b.winner === 'ben');
    const verityWins = resolved.filter(b => b.winner === 'verity');
    const benDollars = benWins.reduce((s, b) => s + Number(b.stake), 0);
    const verityDollars = verityWins.reduce((s, b) => s + Number(b.stake), 0);

    const bw = benWins.length;
    const vw = verityWins.length;
    document.getElementById('winsBen').textContent =
      `${bw} ${bw === 1 ? 'win' : 'wins'} · $${benDollars.toFixed(2)}`;
    document.getElementById('winsVerity').textContent =
      `${vw} ${vw === 1 ? 'win' : 'wins'} · $${verityDollars.toFixed(2)}`;
  }

  function updateOwes() {
    const resolved = currentBets.filter(b => b.resolved && b.winner !== 'void' && b.winner !== 'draw');
    const benTotal = resolved.filter(b => b.winner === 'ben').reduce((s, b) => s + Number(b.stake), 0);
    const verityTotal = resolved.filter(b => b.winner === 'verity').reduce((s, b) => s + Number(b.stake), 0);

    const diff = benTotal - verityTotal;
    const el = document.getElementById('owesText');
    if (diff === 0 && resolved.length === 0) {
      el.textContent = 'No bets settled yet.';
    } else if (diff === 0) {
      el.textContent = 'All square.';
    } else {
      const who = diff > 0 ? 'Verity' : 'Ben';
      el.textContent = `${who} owes $${Math.abs(diff).toFixed(2)}`;
    }
  }

  // ---- Actions ----
  async function placeBet() {
    if (!await requireAuth()) return;

    const desc = document.getElementById('betDesc').value.trim();
    const benPos = document.getElementById('betBen').value.trim();
    const verityPos = document.getElementById('betVerity').value.trim();
    const stake = parseFloat(document.getElementById('betStake').value);

    if (!desc || !benPos || !verityPos) {
      showStatus('Fill in the bet description and both positions.');
      return;
    }
    if (isNaN(stake) || stake <= 0) {
      showStatus('Enter a valid stake amount.');
      return;
    }

    const btn = document.getElementById('placeBtn');
    btn.disabled = true;

    const horizonVal = document.getElementById('betHorizon').value || null;

    const { data, error } = await sb.from('bets').insert({
      description: desc,
      ben_position: benPos,
      verity_position: verityPos,
      stake: stake,
      horizon: horizonVal
    }).select();

    if (error) {
      showStatus('Failed to place bet.');
      console.error(error);
      btn.disabled = false;
      return;
    }

    if (data && data.length > 0) {
      currentBets.push(data[0]);
    }

    document.getElementById('betDesc').value = '';
    document.getElementById('betBen').value = '';
    document.getElementById('betVerity').value = '';
    document.getElementById('betStake').value = '1';
    document.getElementById('betHorizon').value = '';
    document.getElementById('newBetDetails').removeAttribute('open');

    renderAll();
    btn.disabled = false;
  }

  // ---- Resolve flow ----
  function openResolve(betId, description) {
    resolvingBetId = betId;
    document.getElementById('resolveTitle').textContent = description;
    document.getElementById('resolveOverlay').classList.add('active');
  }

  function closeResolve() {
    resolvingBetId = null;
    document.getElementById('resolveOverlay').classList.remove('active');
  }

  async function confirmResolve(winner) {
    if (!resolvingBetId) return;
    if (!await requireAuth()) return;

    const betId = resolvingBetId;
    closeResolve();

    const { error } = await sb
      .from('bets')
      .update({
        resolved: true,
        winner: winner,
        resolved_at: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      .eq('id', betId);

    if (error) {
      showStatus('Failed to resolve bet.');
      console.error(error);
      return;
    }

    const bet = currentBets.find(b => b.id === betId);
    if (bet) {
      bet.resolved = true;
      bet.winner = winner;
      bet.resolved_at = new Date().toISOString();
    }

    renderAll();
  }

  // ---- Edit flow ----
  let editingBetId = null;

  function openEdit(betId) {
    const bet = currentBets.find(b => b.id === betId);
    if (!bet) return;
    editingBetId = betId;
    document.getElementById('editDesc').value = bet.description || '';
    document.getElementById('editBen').value = bet.ben_position || '';
    document.getElementById('editVerity').value = bet.verity_position || '';
    document.getElementById('editStake').value = Number(bet.stake);
    document.getElementById('editHorizon').value = bet.horizon || '';
    document.getElementById('editOverlay').classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('editDesc').focus();
  }

  function closeEdit() {
    editingBetId = null;
    document.getElementById('editOverlay').classList.remove('active');
  }

  async function saveEdit() {
    if (!editingBetId) return;
    if (!await requireAuth()) return;

    const desc = document.getElementById('editDesc').value.trim();
    const benPos = document.getElementById('editBen').value.trim();
    const verityPos = document.getElementById('editVerity').value.trim();
    const stake = parseFloat(document.getElementById('editStake').value);

    if (!desc || !benPos || !verityPos) {
      showStatus('Fill in all fields.');
      return;
    }
    if (isNaN(stake) || stake <= 0) {
      showStatus('Enter a valid stake.');
      return;
    }

    const betId = editingBetId;
    closeEdit();

    const horizonVal = document.getElementById('editHorizon').value || null;
    const bet = currentBets.find(b => b.id === betId);
    const horizonChanged = (bet && bet.horizon !== horizonVal);

    const updatePayload = {
      description: desc,
      ben_position: benPos,
      verity_position: verityPos,
      stake: stake,
      horizon: horizonVal
    };
    // Reset notification flag if horizon was changed
    if (horizonChanged) updatePayload.horizon_notified = false;

    const { error } = await sb
      .from('bets')
      .update(updatePayload)
      .eq('id', betId);

    if (error) {
      showStatus('Failed to save.');
      console.error(error);
      return;
    }

    if (bet) {
      bet.description = desc;
      bet.ben_position = benPos;
      bet.verity_position = verityPos;
      bet.stake = stake;
      bet.horizon = horizonVal;
      if (horizonChanged) bet.horizon_notified = false;
    }

    renderAll();
  }

  async function deleteBet(betId) {
    if (!await requireAuth()) return;
    if (!confirm('Delete this bet?')) return;

    const { error } = await sb.from('bets').delete().eq('id', betId);

    if (error) {
      showStatus('Failed to delete.');
      console.error(error);
      return;
    }

    currentBets = currentBets.filter(b => b.id !== betId);
    renderAll();
  }

  // ---- Settle up ----
  async function settleUp() {
    if (!await requireAuth()) return;

    const resolved = currentBets.filter(b => b.resolved && b.winner !== 'void' && b.winner !== 'draw');
    const benTotal = resolved.filter(b => b.winner === 'ben').reduce((s, b) => s + Number(b.stake), 0);
    const verityTotal = resolved.filter(b => b.winner === 'verity').reduce((s, b) => s + Number(b.stake), 0);

    if (benTotal === 0 && verityTotal === 0) {
      showStatus('Nothing to settle.');
      return;
    }

    const diff = benTotal - verityTotal;
    const net = Math.abs(diff);
    const paid_by = diff > 0 ? 'verity' : (diff < 0 ? 'ben' : null);
    const paid_to = diff > 0 ? 'ben' : (diff < 0 ? 'verity' : null);

    const msg = diff === 0
      ? `Both won $${benTotal.toFixed(2)} — even. Clear the tally?`
      : `${capitalize(paid_by)} pays ${capitalize(paid_to)} $${net.toFixed(2)}. Confirm?`;

    if (!confirm(msg)) return;

    document.getElementById('settleBtn').disabled = true;

    const { error } = await sb.from('bet_settlements').insert({
      ben_winnings: benTotal,
      verity_winnings: verityTotal,
      net_amount: diff === 0 ? 0 : net,
      paid_by: paid_by,
      paid_to: paid_to
    });

    if (error) {
      showStatus('Failed to settle.');
      console.error(error);
      document.getElementById('settleBtn').disabled = false;
      return;
    }

    await loadLastSettlement();
    await loadBets();
    await loadSettlements();
    renderAll();
    document.getElementById('settleBtn').disabled = false;
  }

  // ---- Helpers ----
  function showStatus(msg) {
    const el = document.getElementById('statusBar');
    el.textContent = msg;
    setTimeout(() => el.textContent = '', 3000);
  }

  function escapeHtml(text) {
    if (!text) return '';
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
  }

  function escapeAttr(text) {
    if (!text) return '';
    return text.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/'/g, '&#39;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }

  function capitalize(s) {
    return s ? s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1) : '';
  }

  document.getElementById('resolveOverlay').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (e.target === this) closeResolve();
  });

  document.getElementById('editOverlay').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (e.target === this) closeEdit();
  });

  document.getElementById('loginOverlay').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (e.target === this) cancelLogin();
  });

  document.getElementById('loginPassword').addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') submitLogin();
  });

  // ---- Masthead date ----
  document.getElementById('mastheadDate').textContent =
    new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-AU', {
      weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric'
    });

  // ---- Start ----
  init();
</script>
```
